Section 15ff, , as added , title III, § 301, , authorized appointment of advisory committees by Commissioner.act Aug. 1, 1946, ch. 725, title II, § 206Aug. 2, 1956, ch. 87170 Stat. 928

Section 15gg, , as added , title III, § 301, , provided that amounts paid under sections 15aa to 15jj of this title should in no way affect the availability of funds for practical nurse training under sections 11 to 15, 16, and 18 to 28 and sections 15i to 15m and 15 to 15q of this title.act Aug. 1, 1946, ch. 725, title II, § 207Aug. 2, 1956, ch. 87170 Stat. 928o

Section 15hh, , as added , title III, § 301, , required Commissioner to submit an annual report on administration of sections 15aa to 15jj of this title.act Aug. 1, 1946, ch. 725, title II, § 208Aug. 2, 1956, ch. 87170 Stat. 928
